[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 100111100 5
1 100111001 5
2 111100111 7
3 001100011 4
4 110111110 7
5 111111100 7
6 011111111 8
7 011011111 7

12 21 101100011 5
23 32 001100000 2
34 43 100101100 4
45 54 000010000 1
56 65 011000011 4
67 76 011000110 4
70 07 000011000 2

13 31 100000011 3
24 42 101001100 4
35 53 100111100 5 match 0
46 64 011010011 5
57 75 000000101 2
60 06 011011110 6
71 17 000111010 4

14 41 000101111 5
25 52 101011100 5
36 63 111111111 a
47 74 000010101 3
50 05 000011101 4
61 16 011111100 6
72 27 101011001 5

15 51 000111111 6
26 62 110011111 7
37 73 100111001 5 match 1
